title: #436 Börsens Hänt Extra
summary_md:
# #436 Börsens Hänt Extra

**Feed**: market-makers  
**Published**: 2026-06-11  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

An extra episode of Market Makers dominated by the upcoming SpaceX IPO — framed as the largest ever and a likely top-signal for the current narrow, AI/semiconductor-driven bull market. The hosts also discuss the closed Strait of Hormuz and its muted oil impact, a niche 'barnacle bet' on I-Tech, the fading hype in Sivers, the Octave/Hexagon spin-off trade, and fund-world commentary praising Protein while criticising Colosseum Global Alpha.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟠 ITECH — I-Tech | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: MT  
**Confidence**: 45%

'Barnacle bet': ~1500 ships stuck at Hormuz are fouling; higher oil prices and fouling could raise demand for I-Tech's Selektope antifouling paint.

#### Reasoning

Hosts revisit I-Tech as an interesting case tied to the Hormuz closure. The direct barnacle-removal angle is dismissed as a stretch (the paint only prevents growth), but sustained higher oil prices make fuel-saving antifouling more valuable, supporting the thesis. Speculative and dependent on recurring oil-price/strait dynamics.

#### Sell Triggers

- if oil prices fall back / Hormuz reopens and normalises
- if the antifouling demand thesis fails to show in orders

> *"Jag sa det med ITEC också, jag tycker det är en intressant case."*

---

### 🟠 SIVE — Sivers Semiconductors | **WATCH** (Weak)

**Sentiment**: Mixed | **Time Horizon**: ST  
**Confidence**: 50%

Best PM/order since hype began yet stock fell 14%; segment chief cashed out ~90M SEK — good news no longer lifting the stock may signal the hype is over.

#### Reasoning

Hosts flag Sivers as fascinating to follow: a real (non-Photonics) order plus its best press release of the cycle still produced a 14% drop, and an insider sold heavily. When good news fails to move a hyped stock it often marks a top, making the next few weeks a key watch for confirmation of fading momentum.

#### Sell Triggers

- if the stock continues falling on positive news
- if further insider selling appears

> *"Det är väl sådana grejer som ibland kan vara lite tecken på att det börjar bli över i en sån här hypegrej. Att även bra nyheter skickar inte upp aktion."*

---
